chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Requires Full Blood Money and Half Blood Money in Cases Other Than the Taking of a Life

text: 5294 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ قَالَ قَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ تُقَاسُ عَيْنٌ فِي يَوْمِ غَيْمٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5294 - In the narration of Al-Sakuni, it is reported that Commander of the Faithful (as) said: "An eye is not to be examined (for diyyah) on a cloudy day."
